package.name: duburi_vision
package.description: Perception package for Duburi: a uniform Camera interface (laptop webcam, Gazebo image topic, plus Jetson/BlueOS/MAVLink stubs), YOLO26 detector with GPU-first inference, and rich on-image visualizations (boxes, labels, crosshair, alignment markers, offset readout) so problems are visible in one frame. Tracking and Kalman filtering land later in v2/v3.
